question:
[Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) P2 naming required (`20260420_*.json`); (2) top-level `meta` object with `created_at` ISO 8601 required (P3); (3) `created_at` at the root level must also be ISO 8601 format (P1); (4) append 4th done.log entry (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Which of the following operations require creating a .bak backup file first?

A. Creating a new file 20260420_export_utils.py that does not exist yet
B. Updating day26/constants.py to add a new constant
C. Adding a new route handler to an existing api_routes.py file
D. Writing a brand new test_config.json file
E. Appending a new entry to done.log (which already exists)
F. Updating day26/requirements.txt to add a new package dependency

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...}.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:22 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) P2 naming required (`20260420_*.json`); (2) top-level `meta` object with `created_at` ISO 8601 required (P3); (3) `created_at` at the root level must also be ISO 8601 format (P1); (4) append 4th done.log entry (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Which of the following operations require creating a .bak backup file first?

A. Creating a new file 20260420_export_utils.py that does not exist yet
B. Updating day26/constants.py to add a new constant
C. Adding a new route handler to an existing api_routes.py file
D. Writing a brand new test_config.json file
E. Appending a new entry to done.log (which already exists)
F. Updating day26/requirements.txt to add a new package dependency

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...}.

Based on the feedback pattern, creating a `.bak` backup is required when **modifying existing files** (P4), not when creating new files.

\boxed{B,C,E,F}

answer:
Based on the feedback pattern, creating a `.bak` backup is required when **modifying existing files** (P4), not when creating new files.

\boxed{B,C,E,F}
